compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for nava-platform headless validation script
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create `tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh` with 6 behavioral tests that will FAIL (RED) because the target script does not yet exist.

### Test Specifications

1. `test_script_exists_and_executable` — `test -x plugins/dso/scripts/validate-nava-platform-headless.sh` (fails: script not yet created)
2. `test_help_shows_usage` — runs script with `--help`, asserts exit 0 + usage text in stdout
3. `test_missing_cli_returns_error` — stubs PATH to exclude nava-platform, runs script, asserts non-zero exit + error message containing "nava-platform"
4. `test_list_flags_for_nextjs` — runs script with `--list-flags nextjs` subcommand using a fixture copier.yml, asserts expected --data flags in output. Create a minimal NextJS copier.yml fixture in `tests/fixtures/copier-nextjs.yml` with known question keys.
5. `test_missing_data_flag_exits_nonzero` — stubs nava-platform to simulate a prompt-waiting hang (sleep 3s), omits a required --data flag, asserts script exits non-zero within timeout (expected exit code 124 from timeout, script internal timeout set to 1s)
6. `test_timeout_prevents_hang` — stubs command to sleep 3s, script timeout 1s, asserts exit within 2s with non-zero exit code

### File Impact
- CREATE: `tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh`
- CREATE: `tests/fixtures/copier-nextjs.yml` (minimal fixture)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh
- [ ] Test file syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_\|--- test_" tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED) pre-implementation
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] `.test-index` entry added
  Verify: grep -q 'validate-nava-platform-headless' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh, tests/fixtures/copier-nextjs.yml, .test-index. Tests: 10 RED assertions (all failing as expected).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written — 6 behavioral tests with 10 assertions, all failing (RED). Files: test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh, copier-nextjs.yml, .test-index.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
